_doc: Repo-specific config for the generic burst-bug-hunter skill (Vela). Paths (initScript, verbs) resolve relative to THIS file's directory. driver-server.mjs reads readyExpr/resetExpr/initScript/viewport/jobTimeoutMs; the rest is documentation for the caller.
notes: Reset is IN-MEMORY: .hyper-sprint/render-offline.js exposes window.__velaReset (clears in-mem window.__vmem storage → app falls back to the baked STARTUP_PATCH deck, then remounts a fresh React root = all state reset, no reload), so ctx.reset()/vrun --reset is fast (~100-300ms). Use the ROOT .hyper-sprint/render-offline.js (exposes __velaReset); the canonical tools/vela-dev/scripts/render-offline.js does NOT. burst-init.js installs the in-mem window.storage polyfill (defines __vmem) so the save-status path is exercisable offline. jobTimeoutMs 20s leaves room for multi-step bursts. GOTCHA: vrun's own default client-side wait (VRUN_WAIT, 15s) is SHORTER than this repo's 20s jobTimeoutMs, inverting vrun's documented invariant of waiting a few seconds longer than the server's job cap — a legitimate 15-20s burst can print vrun's client-side timeout error even though the server is healthy and would have delivered the result. Export VRUN_WAIT=25 (or higher) before calling vrun/start-hunt.sh against this config. GOTCHA: once the app enters fullscreen presenter mode (synthetic/real 'f'), Playwright page.keyboard.press AND ctx.shot HANG (headless requestFullscreen) — drive presenter keys via synthetic dispatch (navKey/presentKey verbs) + CDP touch + real mouse/wheel; take shots only after leaving fullscreen.
